bridge-type.label: EMS Manager
bridge-type.description: Root coordinator: scheduler + per-tick energy context + per-controller dispatch. Default shadow-mode = ON.

parameter.name: tickIntervalSeconds
parameter.label: Tick interval (s)
parameter.description: How often the scheduler evaluates controllers. Default 5.

parameter.name: gridSafetyMarginW
parameter.label: Grid safety margin (W)
parameter.description: Reserve held export-positive when computing ECO budgets. Default 500.

parameter.name: gridEwmaTauSec
parameter.label: Grid EWMA tau (s)
parameter.description: Time constant for the grid-load EWMA. Default 30.

parameter.name: shadowMode
parameter.label: Shadow mode (master)
parameter.description: When true, controllers compute but never write setpoints. Master kill-switch. DEFAULTS TO TRUE on first install for safety.

parameter.name: batteryControlMode
parameter.label: Battery control mode
parameter.description: auto = EMS writes setpoints to batterySetpointItemName; fixed = user-set static value (BatteryTouDispatcher inert); readonly = inverter not writable (typical default).

parameter.name: batterySetpointItemName
parameter.label: Battery setpoint item (auto mode)
parameter.description: Item the binding writes to in batteryControlMode=auto. Leave blank in readonly/fixed.

parameter.name: batteryFixedSetpointW
parameter.label: Fixed setpoint (W, fixed mode)
parameter.description: Used when batteryControlMode=fixed. Signed: + = discharge, − = charge.

parameter.name: batteryMinSetpointW
parameter.label: Battery min setpoint (W)
parameter.description: Clamp floor in auto mode. − = max charge from grid.

parameter.name: batteryMaxSetpointW
parameter.label: Battery max setpoint (W)
parameter.description: Clamp ceiling in auto mode. + = max discharge.

parameter.name: injectionPriceEurPerKWh
parameter.label: Injection price (€/kWh)
parameter.description: Price the supplier pays you for fed-in kWh. Used by CostAnalyticsController to compute earnings. Belgian residential typical 0.04-0.08 €/kWh.

parameter.name: boilerForceOnSchedule
parameter.label: Boiler force-on schedule
parameter.description: CSV of day:HH:MM-HH:MM windows (MON TUE WED THU FRI SAT SUN). Empty = disabled. Example: TUE:07:00-09:00,THU:07:00-09:00.

parameter.name: invertGrid
parameter.label: Invert grid sign
parameter.description: Enable if your grid item reports + = import/draw. The binding's canonical convention is + = export/inject; it negates the reading once when this is set.

parameter.name: invertSolar
parameter.label: Invert solar sign
parameter.description: Enable if your solar item reports production as a negative value. The binding's canonical convention is + = producing.

parameter.name: invertHouse
parameter.label: Invert house-load sign
parameter.description: Enable if your house-load item reports consumption as a negative value. The binding's canonical convention is + = consuming.

parameter.name: invertBattery
parameter.label: Invert battery sign
parameter.description: Enable if your battery item reports + = discharging. The binding's canonical convention is + = charging.

parameter.name: statisticsRollupEnabled
parameter.label: Statistics rollup
parameter.description: Snapshot finalized daily totals into clean EMS_Stat_* items at 23:58 each day, so month/year charts stay fast. Disable only if you don't chart long-range energy.

parameter.name: boilerStateItem
parameter.label: Boiler state item
parameter.description: Switch item reflecting the boiler's real on/off state (read).

parameter.name: aircoGroupItem
parameter.label: Air conditioning group item
parameter.description: Switch/group item reflecting whether air conditioning is drawing power (read).

parameter.name: peakShavingEnabledItem
parameter.label: Peak shaving enabled item
parameter.description: Switch item used as the master enable for peak shaving. Missing/UNDEF is treated as enabled.

parameter.name: weatherCloudinessItem
parameter.label: Weather cloudiness item
parameter.description: Number item with today's forecast cloudiness percentage (read).

parameter.name: boilerUserOverrideItem
parameter.label: Boiler user override item
parameter.description: Switch item letting the user force the boiler on, overriding solar/tariff scheduling (read).

parameter.name: publishLegacyMirrorItems
parameter.label: Publish legacy mirror items
parameter.description: Publish the legacy mirror items (PeakShaving_Level/Status/Detail, PeakShaving_EcoCap_A, Available_excess_W, EnergyOrchestrator_Mode, Battery_below_reserve) for pre-existing widgets. Leave off for a fresh install; the binding's own channels carry this data.

parameter.name: capacityMinBillableW
parameter.label: Capacity tariff minimum billable demand
parameter.description: Minimum billable demand for a capacity tariff (Belgium bills a 2500 W minimum). Below this floor there is no point shaving. Set to 0 in markets without a capacity tariff.

parameter.name: evEcoSacrosanct
parameter.label: ECO charging is sacrosanct
parameter.description: When enabled, the peak/billing shedding controllers (capacity tariff and hard peak-shaving) never pause an EV in ECO mode — they shed the boiler and air-conditioning instead. The hardware breaker-headroom limit still applies. Leave off to shed ECO cars first.

parameter.name: boilerDailyTargetKwh
parameter.label: DHW daily energy target (kWh)
parameter.description: Domestic-hot-water boiler planner: guarantee this many kWh into the boiler each day, solar-first then topping up the gap at the cheapest spot hours before the "ready by" hour. 0 disables the planner.

parameter.name: boilerReadyByHour
parameter.label: DHW ready-by hour
parameter.description: Local hour by which the daily DHW target must be met (e.g. 7 = 07:00). The cheapest-hour top-up runs overnight before this hour.

parameter.name: boilerRatedKw
parameter.label: Boiler rated power (kW)
parameter.description: Electrical power the boiler draws when on, used to convert the energy gap into heating hours. Set to your element's rating.

parameter.name: boilerPlanShadow
parameter.label: DHW planner shadow mode
parameter.description: When true, the boiler planner logs its decisions but does not switch the boiler — validate the plan before going live. Set false to let it act.

parameter.name: boilerPowerItem
parameter.label: Boiler power item (W)
parameter.description: Optional W power item the planner uses to measure delivered energy accurately. Blank estimates from rated power x on-time.

channel-type.label: Shadow mode (active)
channel-type.description: Live readback of the bridge's shadow-mode state. ON = no writes are happening.

channel-type.label: Last tick at
channel-type.description: Timestamp of the most recent scheduler tick.

channel-type.label: Tick count
channel-type.description: Number of scheduler ticks since bridge initialization.

channel-type.label: Controllers registered
channel-type.description: Number of controllers currently registered with the scheduler.

channel-type.label: Grid load (raw)
channel-type.description: Raw grid power this tick. + = export, − = import.

channel-type.label: Grid load (EWMA smoothed)
channel-type.description: EWMA-smoothed grid load, tau from bridge config.

channel-type.label: Solar production
channel-type.description: Raw solar power this tick.

channel-type.label: House consumption
channel-type.description: Raw house power this tick.

channel-type.label: Battery flow
channel-type.description: Raw battery power this tick. Internal convention: + = charging, − = discharging.

channel-type.label: Battery state of charge
channel-type.description: Battery state-of-charge mirror.

channel-type.label: Battery reserve target (%)
channel-type.description: User-tunable reserve floor. Read-only mirror.

channel-type.label: Battery below reserve
channel-type.description: ON when SoC < reserve target.

channel-type.label: Available solar excess
channel-type.description: Smoothed grid export minus safety margin; 0 when importing.

channel-type.label: Energy mode
channel-type.description: Derived: SOLAR_EXCESS | BALANCED | GRID_IMPORT | BATTERY_DEPLETING | UNKNOWN.

channel-type.label: Soft peak-shaving — ECO cap (A)
channel-type.description: Live value of the soft peak-shaving controller's ECO current cap. 32 A normal, 8 A when grid import > 5 kW.

channel-type.label: Minimum breaker headroom (A)
channel-type.description: Worst-phase headroom across all cable-connected cars. < 6 A triggers a safety pause request.

channel-type.label: Meter data fresh
channel-type.description: ON when the per-car current meters are producing trustworthy amps. OFF triggers the staleness fail-safe.

channel-type.label: Last controller decisions
channel-type.description: Most recent tick's controller decisions, semicolon-separated. (idle) when nothing fired.

channel-type.label: Hard peak-shaving tier
channel-type.description: 0 = idle, 1 = ECO cars paused, 2 = + boiler off, 3 = + airco off.

channel-type.label: Hard peak-shaving status
channel-type.description: Cumulative status of the active tier in Dutch (one-line summary suitable for a widget banner).

channel-type.label: Hard peak-shaving detail
channel-type.description: Longer Dutch explanation of the active tier — what it touched, why, and what is NOT touched (SNEL cars).

channel-type.label: EV decision reason
channel-type.description: Human-readable reason (controller + why) for this car's most recent EMS decision — e.g. a capacity-tariff pause or a routine SNEL setpoint.

channel-type.label: Grid load (5-min avg)
channel-type.description: Arithmetic mean of raw grid power over the last 5 minutes. Drives the solar-surplus dispatcher.

channel-type.label: Surplus on-threshold
channel-type.description: Live boiler-on threshold computed from cloudiness + battery-reserve adjustments.

channel-type.label: Boiler user-override active
channel-type.description: ON when the user has manually toggled the boiler today — surplus dispatcher steps aside until midnight.

channel-type.label: Capacity — month-to-date peak
channel-type.description: Highest 15-min grid-import average seen so far this month. Reset on month rollover. This is the dimension Belgian capaciteitstarief bills on.

channel-type.label: Capacity — current quarter avg
channel-type.description: Running average of grid power over the current :00/:15/:30/:45 slot (signed; − = import).

channel-type.label: Capacity — projected end-of-quarter
channel-type.description: Projected end-of-slot average (v1 = same as current running avg).

channel-type.label: Capacity — would exceed monthly peak
channel-type.description: ON when the projected end-of-slot average would set a new monthly peak (or push above the 2.5 kW billing floor).

channel-type.label: Capacity — status (Dutch)
channel-type.description: Human-readable Dutch status describing what the capacity-tariff controller is doing this tick.

channel-type.label: Device-meters — tracked W
channel-type.description: Sum of currentW across all registered device-meter Things.

channel-type.label: Device-meters — untracked W
channel-type.description: House power − Σ tracked. The "other / unknown" slice.

channel-type.label: Device-meters — tracked kWh today
channel-type.description: Sum of kWh-today across all device-meter Things.

channel-type.label: Optimizer — 24h plan
channel-type.description: 24-character schedule string: c=charge, d=discharge, .=passive. Hour 0..23 indexed.

channel-type.label: Optimizer — next charge hour
channel-type.description: Hour-of-day (0..23) of the next recommended battery-charge window; -1 if none planned.

channel-type.label: Optimizer — next discharge hour
channel-type.description: Hour-of-day (0..23) of the next recommended battery-discharge window; -1 if none planned.

thing-type.label: Energy Device Meter
thing-type.description: Integrates a power-measuring item (CT clamp, smart plug, Modbus circuit, …) into per-device kWh totals. One Thing per device.

parameter.name: name
parameter.label: Display name
parameter.description: Human-friendly label for the UI (e.g. "Boiler", "Auto 1 — Poort", "Verlichting beneden").

parameter.name: powerItem
parameter.label: Power item
parameter.description: Item providing instantaneous power draw (Watts, or kW if powerInKw=true). Examples: Boiler_Power, Power_FridgeKitchen.

parameter.name: powerInKw
parameter.label: Power in kW
parameter.description: Set true if the source item reports kW instead of W.

parameter.name: energyItem
parameter.label: Cumulative energy item (optional)
parameter.description: If provided, an absolute kWh item — currently informational; future versions may use Δitem instead of integrating power.

parameter.name: category
parameter.label: Category
parameter.description: UI grouping. heating / lighting / ev / appliance / hvac / other.

parameter.name: color
parameter.label: UI color (hex)
parameter.description: For donut chart wedge / progress bar tint.

thing-type.label: Solar Forecast (forecast.solar)
thing-type.description: Polls a solar-production forecast provider (defaults to forecast.solar free tier) and exposes today/tomorrow estimates. Pluggable provider — see kind config.

parameter.name: kind
parameter.label: Provider kind
parameter.description: Which forecast provider to use. Currently ships the free tier.

options.option: forecast.solar free tier (default; 12 calls/h, single plane)

parameter.name: apiBaseUrl
parameter.label: API base URL
parameter.description: Override only if testing against a non-default endpoint.

parameter.name: apiKey
parameter.label: API key (paid tiers)
parameter.description: Not used by the free tier; reserved for forecast-solar-paid + solcast.

parameter.name: lat
parameter.label: Latitude
parameter.description: Site latitude in decimal degrees. Required — Thing stays OFFLINE without it.

parameter.name: lon
parameter.label: Longitude
parameter.description: Site longitude in decimal degrees. Required.

parameter.name: declination
parameter.label: Roof tilt (declination, deg)
parameter.description: 0 = horizontal, 90 = vertical. Typical Flemish roof: 30-40°.

parameter.name: azimuth
parameter.label: Roof azimuth (deg)
parameter.description: 0 = south, 90 = west, -90 = east, ±180 = north.

parameter.name: kwp
parameter.label: Peak power (kWp)
parameter.description: Installed solar peak power.

parameter.name: refreshIntervalMin
parameter.label: Refresh interval (min)
parameter.description: How often to poll the provider. Default 30 min keeps comfortably under the free-tier 12/h rate limit.

channel-type.label: Forecast — now
channel-type.description: Forecast solar production at this hour.

channel-type.label: Forecast — next 1 h
channel-type.description: Forecast energy production for the next 60 minutes.

channel-type.label: Forecast — today total
channel-type.description: Forecast total energy production for the current calendar day.

channel-type.label: Forecast — tomorrow total
channel-type.description: Forecast total energy production for tomorrow.

channel-type.label: Forecast — peak today at
channel-type.description: Timestamp of today's projected production peak.

channel-type.label: Forecast — rate-limit remaining
channel-type.description: API calls remaining in the current rate window (when the provider reports it).

channel-type.label: Forecast — last error
channel-type.description: Most recent fetch error, if any.

channel-type.label: Forecast — today hourly (CSV)
channel-type.description: HH:MM=W,HH:MM=W,… for today. Dashboard chart parses this for forecast-vs-actual overlay.

thing-type.label: Energy Tariff
thing-type.description: User-settable energy tariff. Pluggable kind: flat (single price), day-night (two-rate schedule), tou-schedule (24-hour user-defined). Dynamic spot providers (ENTSO-E etc.) are also supported.

parameter.name: kind
parameter.label: Tariff kind
parameter.description: flat = single fixed rate; day-night = two-rate schedule; tou-schedule = user-defined hourly prices; dynamic-spot = live day-ahead prices from ENTSO-E / Tibber / CSV.

parameter.name: subProvider
parameter.label: Spot sub-provider (kind=dynamic-spot only)
parameter.description: Which upstream service to fetch from. ENTSO-E = free transparency platform raw day-ahead BE bidding zone. Tibber = end-customer-final prices via your Tibber account (BE supported). CSV = generic file/URL for suppliers without APIs (Engie Dynamic / Bolt / Mega Flow / TotalEnergies).

parameter.name: apiKey
parameter.label: API key / token
parameter.description: ENTSO-E security token (register free at transparency.entsoe.eu), OR Tibber personal access token (developer.tibber.com). Leave blank for csv-upload.

parameter.name: csvUrl
parameter.label: CSV URL or local file path
parameter.description: For subProvider=csv-upload. Either http(s):// URL or absolute filesystem path. Expects 24-48 €/kWh values, one per line, OR "timestamp,price" pairs. Pre-tax prices — markup is added on top.

parameter.name: markupEurPerKWh
parameter.label: Markup €/kWh (added on top of raw spot)
parameter.description: Covers taxes, distribution, supplier margin, green-energy levies. Belgian residential typical: 0.12 €/kWh on top of EPEX spot. SET 0 FOR TIBBER (Tibber prices are end-customer-final).

parameter.name: refreshIntervalMin
parameter.label: Refresh interval (min)
parameter.description: How often to poll the upstream. Day-ahead prices don't change intraday so 60+ minutes is plenty. Lower = more API traffic.

parameter.name: flatPriceEurPerKWh
parameter.label: Flat price (€/kWh)
parameter.description: Used when kind=flat.

parameter.name: dayPriceEurPerKWh
parameter.label: Day price (€/kWh)
parameter.description: Used when kind=day-night.

parameter.name: nightPriceEurPerKWh
parameter.label: Night price (€/kWh)
parameter.description: Used when kind=day-night.

parameter.name: dayStartHour
parameter.label: Day start hour
parameter.description: 0..23, local time. Used when kind=day-night.

parameter.name: dayEndHour
parameter.label: Day end hour
parameter.description: 0..23, local time. Day window is [start, end). Can wrap midnight (e.g. start=22, end=6).

parameter.name: hourlyPricesCsv
parameter.label: Hourly prices (24, CSV)
parameter.description: Used when kind=tou-schedule. Exactly 24 comma-separated €/kWh values for hours 0..23.

channel-type.label: Tariff — current price
channel-type.description: Current €/kWh.

channel-type.label: Tariff — schedule today (CSV)
channel-type.description: 24 comma-separated €/kWh values for today's hours 0..23. Widget can parse and chart.

channel-type.label: Tariff — schedule today+tomorrow (CSV)
channel-type.description: 48 comma-separated €/kWh values for today + tomorrow.

thing-type.label: Heat pump
thing-type.description: Heat-pump asset for SCOP-aware optimization. Provide a power-item + temp items; the optimizer publishes a recommended mode each tick. The pump itself is not written to — link the recommendation channel to your pump's mode item via a rule.

parameter.name: powerItem
parameter.label: Power item (W)
parameter.description: Item that reports the pump's current draw in watts.

parameter.name: modeItem
parameter.label: Mode item (read-only echo)
parameter.description: Item the pump's current mode can be read from. Optional; informational only.

parameter.name: scopCop
parameter.label: SCOP (Seasonal CoP)
parameter.description: Used to compute effective €/kWh-thermal. Typical air-water: 3.5–4. Geothermal: 4.5–5.5.

parameter.name: cheapPriceThresholdRatio
parameter.label: Cheap-window ratio
parameter.description: Tariff < dayAvg × this → cheap mode.

parameter.name: expensivePriceThresholdRatio
parameter.label: Expensive-window ratio
parameter.description: Tariff > dayAvg × this → defer mode.

parameter.name: mode
parameter.label: Climate direction
parameter.description: heat (default), cool, or auto (follow the unit's mode item across seasons).

parameter.name: heatModeValue
parameter.label: Mode value = heating (auto)
parameter.description: For mode=auto: the mode-item numeric value that means heating (e.g. KNX airco 1).

parameter.name: coolModeValue
parameter.label: Mode value = cooling (auto)
parameter.description: For mode=auto: the mode-item numeric value that means cooling (e.g. KNX airco 3).

channel-type.label: Heat pump — recommended mode
channel-type.description: One of: OFF / ECO / COMFORT / BOOST.

channel-type.label: Heat pump — effective price (€/kWh-thermal)
channel-type.description: Tariff / SCOP.

channel-type.label: Heat pump — optimizer active
channel-type.description: ON when the recommendation differs from passive comfort mode.

thing-type.label: EV charger
thing-type.description: Per-charger config for the EV coordinator + charging plan. Bind the items the coordinator reads (mode/cable/status/amps/power) and writes (current-limit/pause/charging). When any charger Thing exists it replaces the bridge car%d-pattern config.

parameter.name: carKey
parameter.label: Snapshot key
parameter.description: Defaults to the Thing id. Controllers key per-car state on this.
